entry.title: Re: Manage wokflow for purchase requisition app: add addi...
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

Please, check the following KBA, explaining how to define additional preconditions: 

2767845 - How to define new Procurement  Pre-conditions in Manage Workflow Apps - SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Basically, you need to implement the following badis and select the filters correctly, as per the previous KBA information: 

 

BADI - SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF,  Method  : GET_CONDITIONS  ->>  to define additional conditions for scenarios

BADI - SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL,  Method  : EVALUATE_CONDITION  ->>   to evaluate the additional conditions defined

 

In the KBA you will also get an example code. 

 

Thanks and regards, 

 

Maria

SAP Technical Support

entry.title: Re: RAP Business Events with Advanced Event Mesh [2]: Creating custom business events
entry.content:
Hi @JaviF,

this can be done using dynamic topics:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/810dfd34f2cc4f39aa8d946b5204fd9c/be0ff577a01f43d6ab33252c9bd87e01.html?locale=en-US

Note this feature is only available for AEM and requires S/4 HANA 2023SP02.

Best regards,

Timo

entry.title: Re: How to lock/unlock users in SAP Cloud for Customer
entry.content:
Hello Victor, 
If an Employee record gets replicated into C4C, what is the expected behaviour of the record with respect to remaining locked or unlocked?

If the record does become unlocked, how can prevent this from occuring?

Thanks
Andrew

entry.title: Re: Integrating AI with SAPUI5 Fiori Apps: Part 1 - Concept
entry.content: @Raju_ Can you please check if default-env.json is properly configured with the correct credentials?

entry.title: Process Integration Runtime Instance gives error - SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Friends, 

Good day. 

I was able to subscribe and create instances for Process Integration Runtime and Integration Suite in trial account. It was working fine for few days. 

After some time, Integration Suite subscription was failed and followed by Process Integration Runtime. The error message is given below. 

Service broker error: "Service" broker it-broker-rt failed with: "Forbidden": "Your" tenants provisioning status in an illegal state (Active: (undefined), Unsubscribing: (it-cpitrial05)). Please open a ticket on LOD-HCI-PI-PRV

I don't know suddenly what happened to tenant. I could not find any state in Tenant Page. Since this is trial account, I could not open a case to SAP. 

Could you please clarify?

Thank you. 

Regards, 

Jegatheeswaran P.

entry.title: Re: Solution to Material Number Errors in SAP System
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you check material number in MARA table? or in MM60, IH09?

Regards

entry.title: Defining Business Architecture: A Guide for Your Transformation Project
entry.content:
Why don't Business Processes go to the ERP Transformation Party?

Because they heard that "Change" will be there, and they're still trying to "map" out their outfit from the last update!

Problem Statement:

Organizations frequently embark on business transformation projects with the goal of implementing effective and efficient processes on a new platform. However, in practice, these processes are often inadequately documented. Without a clear understanding of the degree of changes required to adopt standard practices, significant uncertainty arises. This uncertainty complicates the estimation of scope and budget. This issue can be addressed by creating business architecture during the exploration phase of the project.

Why it’s essential to understand Business Processes

Every organization (business, government, not-for-profit) follows business processes to create value by completing a series of tasks in a given sequence. Using processes, business users exchange information, money and materials to create value (by completing a given task). The success of the business is dependent on the efficiencies and effectiveness of these processes. They may complete all steps using paper, phone calls, and fax or use 100+ well-connected systems. These processes may not be documented at all, partially documented, or not updated in years.

Small businesses don’t formalize or document business processes, as an individual task processor's memory can hold ‘how things are done here.’ Their record-keeping systems are more straightforward, and transaction volume is low. They rely on an individual’s capability to get the job done. This doesn’t mean they don’t have to deal with complexities during transformation, but due to the smaller scale of their operation, they can ‘manage’ transitions in technology and market conditions.

However, in large organizations, processes span various business units, departments and IT applications. Data/process steps overlap between systems, often managed through swivel chairs (duplicate entries) and barely linked interfaces. Many process variances arise due to individual preferences as they slightly twist/bend/adapt the system to accommodate their way of working. Often, this results in adding extra business rules/logic to the application. Over the years, as people change jobs and processes evolve, this extra logic becomes ‘illogical/redundant/burden’ aka Technical Debt that knows how to get rid of it.

There are many root causes for not documenting processes. 1) No clear ownership for documenting end-to-end processes. 2) The business users go through the daily motions of process execution based on ‘how things are done here,’ and no one can describe end-to-end processes. People are so busy doing their assigned tasks that they don’t have the time and energy to stop and redesign the process. Documenting business processes seems enormous when you extrapolate 100s of processes to 10s of departments.

How do you define a business architecture for your transformation project?

You are embarking on transforming your business by replacing/upgrading your 15/20-year-old Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) platform. You are in the project’s explore phase. One key task from the business transformation side is to define business architecture.

Business architecture is defined with two separate artifacts

  • Business Capability Model (BCM) that describes the complete set of capabilities an organization requires to fulfill its mission. It’s typically structured hierarchically in three levels and describes WHAT an organization needs to deliver business value and succeed.

SAP Reference Business Capability Model (BCM)

Figure 1 - SAP Reference Business Capability Model (BCM)

  • A Business Process Model (BPM) describes the business processes of an enterprise based on a standardized set of value-creating activities. It’s typically structured hierarchically in levels and describes HOW these value-creating activities will be performed

Figure 2 - SAP Reference Business Process Model (BPM)

The lower process levels will identify which set of capabilities a process needs to execute effectively and which processes a particular capability will serve.

You can use hierarchical elements of BCM and BPM for various purposes. A few advantages of building hierarchies are:

  • Group higher levels into ‘Strategic,’ ‘Core,’ ‘Supporting,’ etc.
  • Perform heat mapping for capability maturity, risks, investment requirements, etc.
  • Help you to schedule workshops and assign capability/process owners, subject matter experts
  • Help you to summarize/aggregate the findings at various levels

Note: SAP Reference Business Architecture provides template/industry variants for BCM and BPM - SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub.

The Business Roles catalog and Business Data catalog are two other business architecture artifacts that should be created in the explore phase. These can be used as input to create business activity flowcharts.

How do you define a business process catalog using the business process hierarchy?

As per the SAP Activate methodology, a few activities occur in the project's explore phase. From the business transformation perspective, one key activity is performing a fit-to-standard analysis to capture a backlog. You will need to define the business process catalogue. You can create a Business Process hierarchy to group various business processes. You can view this grouping from the BCM and BPM points of view.

  1. Business Capability Model (BCM) based grouping:
    • Business Domain (L1), Business Area (L2), Business Capability (L3) + Business Activity (L4)
    • Functional view of the business [difficult to stitch together E2E process]
    • Easier to identify links between business capabilities and software capabilities
  2. Business Process Model (BPM) based grouping:
    • Business Process (L1), Business Process Module (L2), Business Process Segment (L3) + Business Activity (L4)
    • Process-centric [difficult to tackle duplicate capabilities within an organization]
    • Easier to accommodate process variances at higher levels in the hierarchy
    • It is difficult to assign a single End-to-end process owner as processes span across multiple functions

 Figure 3 - Business Process Hierarchy example for "Manage Purchase Order"

A list of business activities will form a business process catalog. One business activity (L4) can be referenced in multiple higher-level processes/process variances. Business activities can be nested inside other business activities to break complex business activities with many steps into manageable activities.

Business Activity (Level 4):

  • is a granular business process that creates value for internal or external stakeholders.
  • will have consistent naming conventions
  • further broken down into tasks (level 5) and steps (level 6)
  • will have a unique process flow that is defined using ‘BPMN’ diagram
    1. Steps to perform in a given sequence with decision points
    2. application/s [input from Application catalog]
    3. data utilized/analyzed [input from Business Data catalog]
    4. Roles/agents responsible for the activity [input from Business Role catalog]

Fit-to-standard workshops will evaluate business processes at this level. SAP Best Practices should be used as starting points when available (reference SAP Signavio Process Navigator). Business Process diagrams with the ‘To-be’ process will be defined, and the backlog will be captured.

Figure 4 - Understanding links between BCM, BPM, Business Activity, Task and Steps

Tips:

  • Start with the SAP reference content and tailor it to your industry/organization needs.
  • Defining the first three levels before diving into listing business activities
  • Involve Business and IT user community

Caution:

  • You can start this exercise on a spreadsheet, but it’s not scalable and not great for collaboration.
  • Get the right tool to manage BCM (e.g. #SAP LeanIX), BPM and BPH (e.g. SAP Signavio)
  • Setup naming standards

You have now defined the Business Process Hierarchy and have the list of all required business activities (L4). You are ready to execute a fit-to-standard workshop to capture the backlog.

Conclusion:

Defining a business architecture is a crucial step in any transformation project. It provides a structured approach to understanding and improving the processes that drive your organization. By mapping out these processes, you can identify inefficiencies, streamline operations, and ultimately achieve your transformation goals. Remember, the success of your project depends on transforming business processes (they need to attend the party!). So, take the time to get it right; your efforts will pay off in the long run.

Reference:

  1. TOGAF Value Streams Guide
  2. SAP Signavio Process Explorer – Accessed Jan 20, 2025 SAP Signavio
  3. Process Mapping Basics: Guiding Your Organization Toward Effective Process Mapping - SAP Signavio - Accessed Jan 20, 2025
  4. The Top 5 Mistakes You Can Make When Naming Business Processes - Accessed Jan 20, 2025
  5. Book: Business Architecture: Collecting, Connecting, and Correcting the Dots, by Roger Burlton. Technics Publication

entry.title: Re: The purchase order cannot be saved in the SAP MM module
entry.content:
Hi,

Its self explanatory message, you need to maintain account assignment in PO creation.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Teaching Enterprise Architecture with Real-World Relevance
entry.content: Good discussion on the state of Enterprise Architecture and some of the voices that influence the profession.

entry.title: batch input stops on warning message Ki166 - for true account assignment
entry.content:
Hi, please help is there is any fine solution or SAP note to skip this message to an batch input , when posting on revenues accounts , with cost element category 11, for a client who has not active COPA and operating concern.
In CO I have on warning message Ki166 - for true account assignment that pops up only on revenues postings ,and it puts the batches input into error if they are process in background only, even if we use a PC assignment.


The message is already set as warning, and can be passed if they process the batch in foreground, but I was wandering if there is a fine solution for skipping this side without switch off the the message .
The system client has no COPA activated. I have already set in OKB9 the specific PC for that revenue with 11 CCtgy element.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: No QM certificate for delivery with mess QC090
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you check task characteristics setting in certificate profile QC02? 

Regards

entry.title: Re: How to stop messages in CPI manually
entry.content:
Hello @r_herrmann 

I'm getting the same error message when trying to stop one processing message:

{
    "successful": false,
    "text": "while trying to get the length of a null array loaded from local variable 'a'"
}

Any hint?

Thanks.

David.

entry.title: Re: Release Navigator for SAP BTP - What' s New in Q4 2024
entry.content: Hi @SunilAhire, thanks for clarifying. The Maintenance Windows and Major Upgrade Windows for SAP Cloud Services is a resource that lists start times and maximum scheduled downtime duration of SAP cloud services, but it does not include specific dates, that's correct. To find specific dates for 2025, please check out the Consolidated Release Schedules for SAP BTP.

entry.title: Re: Order block issue
entry.content: Hi, please check your credit horizon. For detailed anlysis you can check this Blog https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/report-check-cm-a-tool-to-check-sd-documents-with-regard-to-credit/ba-p/13250281#comment-598132

entry.title: Re: Connecting UI5 TypeScript Components locally
entry.content:
@WouterLemaire Great tutorial - I learned from last year's ui5con that it is possible to achieve this using npm workspaces as well, but I haven't been able to get it to work when the child component is using typescript. So I tried running your repo locally to see a working example, but app2 still fails to load the component for me. 

Does it still work for you? Maybe I have done something wrong. 🙃

entry.title: Re: Two applications for SAP Build Work Zone Standard in IAS
entry.content:
Hi Vladimir,

the first application you see in your IAS tenant is the OpenID Connect trust configuration to your BTP subaccount, which is connected through SAP Authorization and Trust Management Service (XSUAA).

The other application is the direct trust configuration between your Work Zone tenant and SAP IAS, also using OpenID Connect. This one does not use XSUAA on BTP and is preferred for several use cases, including custom domain, as is described in SAP Help Portal.

In general, the latter is used to authenticate your Work Zone users, while the former is used to authenticate users when accessing other applications in your BTP subaccount.

Best regards!
Dominik

entry.title: Re: Is Resource Scheduling Job possible to schedule for m...
entry.content:
Hi,

Its not a limitation of the "generate recurring schedule" batch job application, its a limitation of the underlying scheduling tool itself. i.e. go into the 'Asset Management for Resource Scheduling' apps and try to build a single schedule of more than 2 months, you will get the same message.

It's not configurable and is hard coded into the application.

I would recommend putting in an influence request to the S/4HANA team and asking them to extend the Scheduling Period limitation of 2 months that is currently built into the RSH application. Link to Customer Influence 

As a workaround, is there any business limitation where it would be impossible to segment your schedules into less than 2 months at a time?

Tim

entry.title: Re: UI5 - Failed to load 'sap/uxap/ObjectPageLayout.js'
entry.content:
Hello @AlejoFalcone

Just tried it and it seems to be working for me too.

Thank you!

entry.title: How to approve a quote based on group of approvers
entry.content:
How to use group for approval in CPQ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to approve a quote based on group of approvers
entry.content:
It is possible to define a tag to return a group of users in approval process, this can be achieved through tag LIST.

Tag TABLE only returns one user, therefore should be avoided if there is a need to return more than one user.

entry.title: Re: Prepare for the Future: Major SAP SuccessFactors Changes Coming in 2025 and 2026
entry.content:
@nageshpolu - you write in your blog that Canvas reports will be deprecated by End of 2025. Could you please link to an official SAP source where that is stated? To my understanding the deprecation of Canvas (and Tabel reports) have been postponed and SAP will provide more communication on this topic in the second half of 2025. https://community.sap.com/t5/product-and-customer-updates/retirement-of-canvas-table-tiles-dashboards-and-classic-report-types/bc-p/13619547

Thanks!

Kind regards,
Lars

entry.title: Re: Two applications for SAP Build Work Zone Standard in IAS
entry.content: Hi. Thank you! If I understood you correctly, the first one manages Platform users, the second one for Business (Application ) users?

entry.title: Re: Web Dispatcher in S/4 Fiori embedded deployment
entry.content:
SECURITY, if you want to keep the backend server on a separated network and force the users connection through something like a DMZ, or have external access from the INTERNET.

Please look into this document: https://assets.dm.ux.sap.com/sap-user-groups/pdfs/241219_help_the_internet_is_coming_sap_web_dispatcher_and_secure_exposure.pdf

entry.title: How to fetch the documents attached to Inspection method table SAP
entry.content:
I am trying to get the list of documents attached to the inspection method and to display it in record inspection results with a custom app.

Got the inspection lot and method combination from QAMV

Got the Method data from QMTB.

But not able to get the data of documents attached to it. Pls guide.

Also please share any sample FRS document for UI5 apps.

entry.title: Re: Two applications for SAP Build Work Zone Standard in IAS
entry.content: No, both are used for application users in this case - for the second application, this is Work Zone itself, for the first application (using XSUAA), this could be any other BTP service or custom application deployed in your subaccount.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: "Reverse" Outdated supplier status
entry.content:
Hello @Paulo_Pinto, for the 2502 Public Cloud Release tomorrow and the OP2025 Release in October, this should not be an issue anymore. You will be able to take an "Outdated Supplier Material" and change the status back to Approved or Blocked. 

We don't see a way that a consultant could do this to an older version.

entry.title: Re: Prepare for the Future: Major SAP SuccessFactors Changes Coming in 2025 and 2026
entry.content: @lars_hentzen my apologies, corrected - Yes, as of today, SAP pushed the dates to later, still, customers are advised to migrate to newer reporting tools as SAP plans to phase out legacy reporting tools. While exact dates have not been published. But, as you know, Stories in People Analytics will replace all other SuccessFactors 'Legacy' reporting tools using a phased approach.

entry.title: Re: Is there a Method to translate CQN to resulting DB dependent SQL?
entry.content: Any Updates?

entry.title: Re: How to optimize the apps deployed on cloud foundry?
entry.content:
Hi @piyushvns21,

To assist you better, could you clarify whether your application is a CAP application with a Fiori front end or a custom SAP UI5 app?

Here are some useful resources:

  • For CAP: Performance Modeling in CAP
  • For SAP UI5:
    • UI5 Performance Optimization Guide
    • UI5 App Performance Guidelines
    • YouTube: Devtoberfest 2022 - Improving the Performance of UI5 Applications

If you can share more details about your application (e.g., specific libraries or components being used), it will be easier to provide more tailored advice.

Kind regards
Johannes

entry.title: Re: Webservice - grac_risk_analysis_wout_no_ws - how to get the composite role in the result?
entry.content: Any further ideas? Is it somehow possible to have the causing composite role in the result?

entry.title: New configuration Settlement Management in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi community,

I'm testing "Settlement Management" on S4 to replace "rebate" on ECC.
I'm doing some configuration, which I saw some support at https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/settlement-management-condition-contracts/ba-p/13484326.

I created a contract at tcode WCOCO similar to the link above.
Then I went to tcode WB2R_SC with this contract. At this moment I no longer have errors, but it does not generate any Credit Memo Request.


It looks like it only creates a temporary document.
I am using standard documents and numbering. What configuration will be missing?

 

Best Regards,

Daniel

entry.title: Re: Automation Pilot : Start & Stop HANA Instance, Schedule Executions on Automation Pilot
entry.content:
Yes start and stopping is available using the other environment.  The tutorial group https://developers.sap.com/group.sap-hana-cloud-automating.html provides examples using the CLI and SAP Automation Pilot for instances deployed to Cloud Foundry and to the subaccount (other environment).

Hope that helps,
Dan van Leeuwen

entry.title: Inspection type 89 'Other inspection' not available in Starter S/4HANA Cloud System
entry.content:
In system inspection type 89 is not available. Kindly help us with note or any solution which can help to get inspection type 89 into Starter system of SAP Public cloud.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Inspection type 89 'Other inspection' not available i...
entry.content:
The Inspection type 89 'Other inspection' is available with the activation of the scope item 'Nonconformance Management (2QN)'

 

Please activate the scope item by following the procedure outlined in the KBA https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3122430

entry.title: Re: Disenchantment: GPT for generating ABAP code documentation
entry.content: @luis_rod To be honest, I was more looking for other AI tools dedicated to this kind of work. I guess that Gemini and other GenAI engines won't do the job either, even if it looks better, it's far from what I'm expecting. Understanding code is not what AI can do for now, for now AI is just "rewording based on best statistical match".

entry.title: VPN Network Sizing for 300 user or 60 Fue
entry.content:
Hi ,

We are using S/4  HANA2023 in SAP Rise and we are having a 10Mbps VPN bandwidth  from Rise to Customer HO? Is the 10Mbps bandwidth  sufficient for handling 300 user or 60 Fue ? On what basis we can size the Network bandwidth for S/4  HANA users in SAP rise? Help highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Updating custom field for Return Order (Order Type: C...

Hello @arunnaik

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Key User Extensibility Add Custom Field

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Account 'KTNAFB : Acc.Dep. Accnt.for Ordinary Dep' could not be found for area 30 Message no. AU133
entry.content:
While doing Asset settlement AUC to main asset not able to settled same asset class i have done one AUC but other not able to do 

i have check all configuration is correct but still facing same issue  

Account 'KTNAFB : Acc.Dep. Accnt.for Ordinary Dep' could not be found for area 30

Message no. AU133

Diagnosis

The system could not find account 'KTNAFB : Acc.Dep. Accnt.for Ordinary Dep' for company code XXXX in depreciation area 30 when creating the journal entry.

Procedure

1. Check whether a G/L account is defined in the account determination of Asset Accounting (in Customizing for Asset Accounting for example under Assign G/L Account or under Define Offsetting Account for Legacy Data Transfer 

  1. Check whether the defined G/L account is created in your company code.
  2. Define a G/L account or create the G/L account in your company code.

SAP FI Asset Accounting

Regards 

Ajay

entry.title: Re: Implement Currency Conversion in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
can you please confirm if the SAP Cloud Connector has to be enable for importing from an S4/HANA onprem system. it is not obvious in any SAP official documentation that i can find.

 

thanks

g

entry.title: How to display page header on start of every page on crystal report ?
entry.content:
Issue with Page Header Display in Crystal Report

I am working on a Crystal Report that contains 5 pages. I need to display the page header at the start of page when finish .

The page header displays correctly on the first page. However, on subsequent pages, the page header appears at the bottom of the page instead of the top.

 

report contain to 3 section 

page header

sub report1

subreport2

suppose my report display 2 companies 

first company take two page 

second company will start from third page but this not happen 

it  start from second page and this is my issue 

I need the page header to display at the top of Page when start.

meaning it will start from page third on top to be as second company

How can I achieve this?

entry.title: Re: Why do I still report an error after using a dynamic DELETE statement?
entry.content:
Hi, I think your mistake is enclosing the actual condition you use in the WHERE clause in single quotes. Try removing them and check the results.

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Sci-Kit learn library in SAP Datasphere Data Flow
entry.content:
Hi @Moritz_F, the Python operator in a Datasphere Data Flow supports only the Python packages listed here. Further packages cannot be installed. Please also consider that the Python operator receives the data in packages. You are not guaranteed to get all data at once. Hence I see two options:

  1. Consider whether your scikit-learn logic can be implemented using the HANA Machine Learning, that is part of Datasphere's HANA Cloud. Here is an example https://community.sap.com/t5/artificial-intelligence-and-machine-learning-blogs/hands-on-tutorial-machine-learning-with-sap-datasphere/ba-p/13796417
  2. Alternatively you would need to extract the data to a Python environment (ie in BTP: Jupyter Notebooks in Business Application Studio or Python in Cloud Foundry) and write any output back to Datasphere

entry.title: Add an accounting document to an SD sales flow
entry.content:
Hello!

I would like some help, we need to make an accounting entry referring to a document billed by SD, but it will be a manual entry, I would like to know if there is the possibility of adding this entry to the SD flow, in VF...
Is there a more Standard way possible, and if it's just Z, how would I do it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

PT BR

Ola!

Gostaria de uma ajuda, precisamos fazer um lançamento contábil referente a um documento faturado por SD, mas será um lançamente manual, gostaria de saber se existe a possibilidade de adicionar esse lançamento no fluxo de SD, na VF...
Existe algum modo mais Standard possível, e se for somente Z, como eu faria?

entry.title: Wrong conversion of amount to condition value in Purchase Order (SAP S/4Hana)
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

Can you help me with the following issue? For our customer, we are doing a brown field conversion from ECC to S/4Hana (2023 – FPS02).

After the conversion to S/4, I have noticed unexpected behaviour in the PO pricing. There are two issues:

  1. There is a difference by a factor of 1000 between the entered amount and the calculated condition value.
  2. The Net price automatically rounds to full numbers.

Below is an example of such a PO price. This is also the same for other condition types such as PB00.

In the example below, the desired result was an order of 100 pieces at 987.61 EUR per piece, so 98 761 EUR. However, SAP rounds up to 988 and divides the unit price by 1000.

This results in a net price of 99 EUR for the PO item. This is not correct

 

I have reviewed the condition type PBXX and PB00 and cannot find any strange settings. The condition settings were taken over as is from the original system.

 

 

I have also verified if it was not a requirement that was causing this, but I could not find any requirements responsible for converting to this.

I have also verified the currency settings and have not seen anything out of the ordinary.

Please assist,

Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition & SAP Mobile St...
entry.content: Hello @adityaarora, thank you for the reply. The aim is to switch between the available Build Work Zone page languages, not the SAP Start Mobile languages. This is something available when you open the page on the desktop browser, but not when you open the same page in SAP Mobile Start.

entry.title: Dear Expert,When we try to create a Generic Material Code from MM41 we are facing issue "
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

When we try to create a Generic Material Code from MM41 we are facing issue "

Cannot use conf. class ZBED_CLASS, class type 300 for generic article creation

Message no. MH336"

We are using Variant class 300 and assigned with Multiple characters Like Color, Size, Other few Characters. Can we assign multiple characters in Variant class300,is this issue for throwing above error.

entry.title: What are the ways to connect SAP PO to SQL DB ?
entry.content:
Hi,

The requirement is to send data from SAP ECC to SQL DB. We have the option of connecting to SQL DB via JDBC adapter. But the client is insisting on using HTTPS connectivity. 

How can this be achieved? 

Regards,

LR

entry.title: Re: 7 Things You Need to Know About SAP Start
entry.content:
Hi Michael,

Thank you for your information.

I have 2 questions.

1. Is SAP Start one of the SAP Build portfolio solutions?

2. Can SAP Start and SAP Build work together? For example, calling applications created in SAP Build?

entry.title: How to Post Noted item with Special GL Indicator W
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

COuld you pelase let us know how to create a noted item with special GL indicator W for tracking the Bill of exchange in public Cloud.

Basically the requiremnet is "Bank guarantee needed report which BG will expire next month/ which are Due (For both AP/AR)" 

Also our customer has not opted for TRM.

Regards,

Santosh

entry.title: Re: error : failed to fetch data
entry.content: Use RSRT to re-generate the queries after BW change. This will solve the "failed to fetch data..." issue.

entry.title: CDS views for COBRA & COBRB tables related to settlement rules

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi @EVass sounds great. I want to introduce you to SAP others in Texas @rileyrainey, SAP Mentor @DiegoDora, @brian_dennett @SimonTo  and SAP champion @SergioG_TX.

If you haven't yet you probably want to join the Dallas - SAP Community location group!

Also, want to connect you with my fellow community advocates @lauraschmitz @KatherineKenneally 

Best of luck and see you in the community!

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center: New way to view, download and transport configurations
entry.content:
Hi @hariprasadgud 

I'm working on transporting 22 roles today and ran into errors like:

  • IJ031070: Transaction cannot proceed: STATUS_MARKED_ROLLBACK
  • Wrapped Exception: DAOException caught: IJ031070: Transaction cannot proceed: STATUS_MARKED_ROLLBACK
  • SQLException caught: IJ031070: Transaction cannot proceed: STATUS_MARKED_ROLLBACK

I guess the cause for these errors is too many roles in 1 bundle. Can you confirm? And if so, what exactly is the limitation? I now only see it is not working on validating the import. Would be nice if I would get the error earlier so I can update the bundle. Assuming the size of changes is the cause.

I redid the transport with only 10 roles: no issue
2nd part with 12 roles: same issue for the last 3

Would be great to get some insights around this.

Thanks!
Roos🌹

entry.title: Re: issue with java script action in Build apps
entry.content:
I created a button and run a JS flow function with your code:

 

I added the code (return) so that the flow function would output the answer to the next flow functions, but it even worked without.

entry.title: Re: New "Wait for API Call" Integrates Processes with External Systems

Hi Daniel,
Very interesting blog.
I have a question: when the agent stops to wait for the API call, is the agent released and available to be used for other processes, or does it remain occupied with that process until it is completed?

Thank you,
Davide

entry.title: Re: issue with java script action in Build apps
entry.content: can you please show me the js Code screen shot, because , the input for the JS code i'm taking as "output" from another node.

entry.title: Re: How to reach out to SAP Education - Learning Hub team for support
entry.content: Hello ,  I just checked with CIC support team and my  UID is correctly set up S0021778824, unfortunately I cannot see my past certification on my sap account, in this case I cannot extend them with a new exam. I can see them on Credly platform but not on my learning sap- my learning- certifications

entry.title: How to create picking warehouse tasks for an outbound delivery order on RF device?
entry.content:
Hello!
I have one question on SAP S4/HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Is it possible to create picking warehouse tasks for an outbound delivery order on RF device? If so, how can I do it?

Many times I´ve created putaway warehouse tasks for an inbound delivery on RF device (Inbound Process -> Receiving of HUs -> Receiving HU by delivery). I´d like to do the same for picking warehouse tasks for an outbound delivery on RF, but can´t find a way.

Best Regards

entry.title: The most suitable book
entry.content: "Regarding an ERP system novice, what is the most recommended book?"

entry.title: Re: New "Wait for API Call" Integrates Processes with External Systems
entry.content:
Thanks for comments.

When you say agent, I am assuming you are talking about automation (iRPA). But this is a process step, not an automation activity. My understanding is that the process instance completely stops until the API call is made.

entry.title: Re: Accept API payment through External Cash Desk via SAP BTP
entry.content:
Nikhil, 

Try to explore the SAP DPAO Functionality once rather than External Cash Desk, if SAP DPAO is under the S4 Contract, it has much more enhanced features than External cash desk.

On the other hand, with external cash desk, you have to do the below config settings 

Further more you have to activate the ODATA Services for 

(a) Accept and Integrating Payments

(b) Payment Status Determination

(c) Payment reversal

(d) Asynchronous Bank responses.

Thanks

Amlan

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia
entry.content:
Hi Members,

Would you please let me know where we can store the IRBM number in the FI document number. As IRBM is 26 characters & we don't have any field available at header level with 26 characters. We are not using the full (DRC) solution provided by SAP.

 

Thank in advance

entry.title: Re: issue with java script action in Build apps
entry.content: I took your code as is, with the input inside the JS. So I assume your issue is something of how the input is getting inside the JS flow function. But is this JS in SAP Build Apps project or in SAP Build Process Automation project?

entry.title: Re: What are the ways to connect SAP PO to SQL DB ?
entry.content: Then you would need a web application in between to proxy the communication to the database.

entry.title: Re: issue with java script action in Build apps
entry.content: i'm making a get call with JS node in SAP Build apps, whose output(type : text ) , i'm passing as input to the next JS code node in Build apps

entry.title: Re: Leave roll over for all employees to 31st march 2025
entry.content: Can you Share the Rule

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia
entry.content:
Hello adityajan,

there is no option to not use the full solution and some kind of partial construct for DRC. DRC consists of the XML creation portion and the end-to-end submission to the recipient. It requires the license for SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, Cloud Edition and cannot be circumvented. Anything else is neither recommended nor supported by SAP. I am rather curious who informed you that a partial solution is available, perhaps you can share for the benefit of the other people on this thread as well.

Thanks,

Martin

entry.title: Re: issue with java script action in Build apps
entry.content: Might help to see more of that JS flow and the way you are getting it inside the next JS dlow.

entry.title: Nonconformance AI-based Insights in SAP Digital Manufacturing PODs
entry.content:
Disclaimer: This is a personal custom (in-progress) development for learning purposes.

To begin my learning journey with AI Agents, I came up with the following storyline:

An AI Agent that keeps an eye in the current shift nonconformances, provide AI-based insights and recommendations, and with some reasoning, decides and take some proactive and automatic actions, like raising alerts to collaborate with supervisors and maintenance team, or trigger actions in other solutions or external systems, if any support seems to be needed.

Today, I reached the very first milestone of my story: "Keep an eye in the current shift nonconformances and provide AI-based insights and recommendations".

To achieve that, I used SAP Digital Manufacturing, SAP AI Core and SAP Generative AI Hub, SAP BTP and python to build the following orchestration logic:

  1. Retrieve Nonconformances from SAP Digital Manufacturing via /v1/nonconformances API for the current shift.
  2. Prompt a trained model in SAP AI Core / SAP Generative AI Hub via API, providing the nonconformances as input.

Which is deployed in SAP BTP, and called from SAP Digital Manufacturing PODs via an Action Button, to display the AI-based insights and recommendations on the fly using POD Messages, as shown below:

More to come, hopefully soon! Stay tuned. 🙂

Learn more about Generative AI Hub in SAP AI Core, see diagram below:

Br, Manoel Costa

entry.title: Re: How to fetch the documents attached to Inspection met...
entry.content:
Greetings,

can you try table DRAD. There you can find document assigned to object. You can filter by object type (QMTBDOC) and object key. Object key is [PLANT][METHOD][VERSION].

Best regards, M

entry.title: An error msg. id F2003 as "This account XXXX is one-time" in Tcode XK02,
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

While entering customer in control view of vendor master record in Tcode XK02,

System prompts an error msg. id F2003 as "This account XXXX is one-time".

We are going to migrate to S/4 HANA from ECC.

Please guide me to solve this.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: New configuration Settlement Management in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi @daniel_cunha1, 

In the preceding screen, please ensure that you select "Live Run" as the Run Type (under the Program Run Control section).

Additionally, in SAP Settlement Management, the system does not create a Credit Memo Request in SD as it would in ECC. Instead, it generates a Settlement Document with a direct posting to FI. There is also an option in the configuration to prevent the automatic release of the FI document if needed, providing greater control over the process.

Welcome to the SAP Settlement Management module! It features a completely different architecture and agreement management approach compared to SAP ECC SD rebates, offering enhanced flexibility and capabilities.

Best regards,
Gauthier

entry.title: SAP Fieldglass: Learn More About New and Consolidated Features
entry.content:
Hello! In this blog, we explore both new and established SAP Fieldglass features. Keeping up with changes can be challenging, but we're here to help. We've created two videos to guide you through new features that enhance your SAP Fieldglass experience. For those interested in familiar features, we've prepared seven guidebooks in PDF format. Whether you're curious about new updates or want to review existing features, these resources will help you make the most of SAP Fieldglass.

 

Data Privacy

Video Tutorial

In this video, we show how to access the main features related to data privacy in SAP Fieldglass. 

Link: https://video.sap.com/media/t/1_qo0x7cii 

0:09 - Configurations needed to change data privacy settings 

0:48 - How to access the Personally Identifiable Information (PII) in your system 

1:09 - How to navigate the PII report 

1:56 - How to manually erase data 

2:46 - How to set the PII thresholds lookup  

3:45 - How to use the PII thresholds lookup output 

 

What's New (2405 Release)

Video Tutorial

This video highlights two great features introduced in release 2405: SAP Companion and Enhanced Sign-in Assistant. 

Link: https://video.sap.com/media/t/1_ctaslpvk

0:06 - SAP Companion 

0:51 - Enhanced Sign-in Assistant 

 

Consolidated Features 

Guidebooks

Here, you can download guidebooks explaining how to configure and use a few well-established features in SAP Fieldglass, such as data sets and SOW Bids:

  • SAP Fieldglass - Data Sets 
  • SAP Fieldglass - Tax Management Features 
  • SAP Fieldglass - SOW Bids 
  • SAP Fieldglass - Tenure Policy Management 
  • SAP Fieldglass - Statement of Work (SOW) Characteristics 
  • SAP Fieldglass - Company Structure (Guide for Buyers) 
  • SAP Fieldglass - Rates 2.0   

 

Questions? Post them as comments!

entry.title: Re: SAP BPC End of Life (?)

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center: New way to view, download and transport configurations
entry.content:
Hi @RoosReijers , Can you please log us an support incident?

Thanks,

Hari

entry.title: Re: How to get certificate to our personal mail id
entry.content:
Hi @Anusha1224 
It looks like this is a new question. 
I would like to encourage to always use our Ask Questions section and post your question there.
This makes it easier  to follow-up:
That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses.
Would you mind to repost it ?

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: An Introduction to Documentation Versions on the SAP Help Portal for Functional Localization
entry.content:
I’m pleased to share the latest information on accessing documentation on the SAP Help Portal for SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. In this blog post, I’ll explain how you can choose the right documentation version for your technical requirements and discuss the recent updates on the SAP Help Portal for maintenance phases.

Title image for the topic of documentation versions on the SAP Help Portal

I’ll be focusing today on the country/region-specific documentation for SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition that is published through the Documentation Delivery with SAP Notes process, though there are useful tips here for everyone who browses version-specific content on the SAP Help Portal.

1. Choosing the Right Documentation Version for You

The SAP Help Portal is your number-one resource for information on SAP products. When navigating documentation, it’s important to verify that the version you’re browsing is correct for your solution. You can do this by checking the Version Selector drop-down menu:

Drop-down version selection on the SAP Help Portal

Why do we recommend this version verification step? Well, you can access SAP Help Portal documentation by many different means, such as links from SAP Notes and What’s New topics, as well as from search engines. You may be directed to the highest version, which is not necessarily the same version implemented by your company. Different versions may have different scope functionality described in the documentation, so it’s best to always check this drop-down menu when accessing the SAP Help Portal.

2. New on the SAP Help Portal: Maintenance Information

You might have noticed that, when you access documentation for SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, there’s a new information banner that specifies the maintenance phase:

Maintenance message now available on the SAP Help Portal

This information banner differentiates between two maintenance phases, Mainstream Maintenance and Extended Maintenance. If you are an SAP customer or partner with a valid SAP S-User ID, you can refer to the SAP Maintenance Phases resource for further details on this topic.

For the most recent documentation versions on the SAP Help Portal, you are informed that “documentation is updated with the support package stacks”. However, there is an important exception to this rule for country/region-specific updates delivered for functional localization.

3. Always Up-to-Date: Documentation Delivery for Functional Localization

For country/region-specific development delivered for functional localization, such as legal changes, a new process provides documentation updates between support package stacks. As detailed in the recent blog post on Documentation Delivery on the SAP Help Portal with SAP Notes, you now have access to SAP Help Portal documentation that reflects the latest information, regardless of the planned support package release dates.  

For both the mainstream and extended maintenance phases of SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, we’re glad to provide you with up-to-date information on how SAP meets the local legal requirement for your solution. 

To find more information on country/region-specific topics, I recommend the Localization topic page on the SAP Community. There you can find the latest news, resources, and upcoming events for SAP’s localized solutions. Remember, too, that you can always select the Create a Question option on the Localization topic page to engage with experts and resolve any doubts you may have:

Create a Question for Localization on the SAP Community

And for those of you who use SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, you can find more details on the SAP Help Portal and SAP Community in our dedicated blog series:

  • An Introduction to SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Navigating the SAP Help Portal
  • An Introduction to SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Engaging with the SAP Community

That’s it for today, though please let me know in the comments section if you have any questions. Your feedback is always appreciated.

Thank you and until next time,

Barnabas

entry.title: Re: issue with java script action in Build apps

entry.title: Xblnr_alt update via function module or IRBM no field for malaysia
entry.content:
Hello Members,

Would you please let us know the functional module to update the XBLNR_ALT field to update the IRBM number for Malaysia.

We are not using  the solution provided by SAP for Malaysia e-invoicing.
We are trying to use XBLNR_ALT field to update the IRBM number via FM. If there is any other field we can use to store the IRBM number in the FI document number, please let us know.

thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: can't open this link - replicate SQLA to msSQL
entry.content:
The Doc Comment Exchange (DCX) system was retired at the end of 2023. That content is available on SAP Help SQL Anywhere. As an aside, this question has references to SQL Anywhere 16 content. That version has reached End of Mainstream Maintenance (EOMM). 

See my response in your original question which provides links to relevant content for SQL Anywhere 17.  Here is the link to Synchronization Models as my previous response points to the entire document where this content is provided.
